input: Alphabet: teach letter 'ئ' (Sorani). Provide pronunciation and two short example words and a one-sentence example.
output:
Letter: ئ
Pronunciation: /ʔ/ (glottal stop)
Examples: ئێوارە — êware (evening); ئاو — aw (water)
Sentence example: ئێوارە دەچمە بازاڕ. — I go to the market in the evening.

input: Alphabet: teach letter 'ا' (Sorani). Provide pronunciation and two short example words and a one-sentence example.
output:
Letter: ا
Pronunciation: /a/ or /ɑ/
Examples: ئاو — aw (water); ئارام — aram (calm)
Sentence example: ئاو ئارامکەرەوەیە. — The water is calming.

input: Alphabet: teach letter 'ب' (Sorani). Provide pronunciation and two short example words and a one-sentence example.
output:
Letter: ب
Pronunciation: /b/
Examples: بڕۆ — biṛo (go); بەخت — bext (luck)
Sentence example: من بەختەوەرم. — I am lucky.

input: Alphabet: teach letter 'پ' (Sorani). Provide pronunciation and two short example words and a one-sentence example.
output:
Letter: پ
Pronunciation: /p/
Examples: پیاو — pyaw (man); پەروەردە — perwerde (education)
Sentence example: پیاوەکە کار دەکات. — The man is working.

input: Alphabet: teach letter 'ت' (Sorani). Provide pronunciation and two short example words and a one-sentence example.
output:
Letter: ت
Pronunciation: /t/
Examples: تۆ — to (you); تەمەن — temen (age)
Sentence example: تۆ چۆنی؟ — How are you?

input: Alphabet: teach letter 'ج' (Sorani). Provide pronunciation and two short example words and a one-sentence example.
output:
Letter: ج
Pronunciation: /d͡ʒ/ (like English 'j' in 'jam')
Examples: جوان — cwan (beautiful); جاران — caran (sometimes)
Sentence example: ئەو جوانە. — He/she is beautiful.

input: Alphabet: teach letter 'چ' (Sorani). Provide pronunciation and two short example words and a one-sentence example.
output:
Letter: چ
Pronunciation: /t͡ʃ/ (ch as in 'church')
Examples: چا — ça (tea); چۆن — çon (how)
Sentence example: تکایە چایەک بمدەرێ. — Please give me a tea.

input: Alphabet: teach letter 'ح' (Sorani). Provide pronunciation and two short example words and a one-sentence example.
output:
Letter: ح
Pronunciation: /ħ/ (voiceless pharyngeal fricative, from Arabic loans)
Examples: حەز — hez (desire); حەوت — hewt (seven)
Sentence example: من حەزم لێیە. — I like it.

input: Alphabet: teach letter 'خ' (Sorani). Provide pronunciation and two short example words and a one-sentence example.
output:
Letter: خ
Pronunciation: /x/ (kh as in German 'ach')
Examples: خانوو — xanû (house); خۆش — xoş (good)
Sentence example: خانووەکە گەورەیە. — The house is big.

input: Alphabet: teach letter 'د' (Sorani). Provide pronunciation and two short example words and a one-sentence example.
output:
Letter: د
Pronunciation: /d/
Examples: دەست — dest (hand); دوو — du (two)
Sentence example: دەستم ئێرەیە. — My hand is here.

input: Alphabet: teach letter 'ر' (Sorani). Provide pronunciation and two short example words and a one-sentence example.
output:
Letter: ر
Pronunciation: /r/ (tapped/rolled r)
Examples: ڕۆژ — ṛoj (day); ڕەنگ — ṛeng (color)
Sentence example: ئەمڕۆ ڕۆژێکی باشە. — Today is a good day.

input: Alphabet: teach letter 'ڕ' (Sorani). Provide pronunciation and two short example words and a one-sentence example.
output:
Letter: ڕ
Pronunciation: /ɾ/ (distinct Kurdish tapped r)
Examples: ڕۆژ — ṛoj (day); ڕۆح — ṛoḧ (soul/spirit)
Sentence example: ڕۆژەک جوانە. — The day is beautiful.

input: Alphabet: teach letter 'ز' (Sorani). Provide pronunciation and two short example words and a one-sentence example.
output:
Letter: ز
Pronunciation: /z/
Examples: زمان — ziman (language); زۆر — zor (much/very)
Sentence example: من زمانی کوردی دەزانم. — I know Kurdish language.

input: Alphabet: teach letter 'ژ' (Sorani). Provide pronunciation and two short example words and a one-sentence example.
output:
Letter: ژ
Pronunciation: /ʒ/ (zh as in 'vision')
Examples: ژیان — jyan (life); ژن — jin (woman)
Sentence example: ژیان پڕە لە خۆشی. — Life is full of happiness.

input: Alphabet: teach letter 'س' (Sorani). Provide pronunciation and two short example words and a one-sentence example.
output:
Letter: س
Pronunciation: /s/
Examples: سڵاو — sław (hello); سەردەم — serdem (era/time)
Sentence example: سڵاو، چۆنی؟ — Hello, how are you?

input: Alphabet: teach letter 'ش' (Sorani). Provide pronunciation and two short example words and a one-sentence example.
output:
Letter: ش
Pronunciation: /ʃ/ (sh)
Examples: شەو — şew (night); شایی — şayî (happiness)
Sentence example: شەوت باش. — Good night.

input: Alphabet: teach letter 'ع' (Sorani). Provide pronunciation and two short example words and a one-sentence example.
output:
Letter: ع
Pronunciation: /ʕ/ (voiced pharyngeal fricative, often in Arabic loans)
Examples: عەلی — Elî (Ali - name); عەدالەت — edalat (justice)
Sentence example: ناوی عەلی ناوێکی جوانە. — The name Ali is a beautiful name.

input: Alphabet: teach letter 'غ' (Sorani). Provide pronunciation and two short example words and a one-sentence example.
output:
Letter: غ
Pronunciation: /ɣ/ (voiced velar fricative)
Examples: غەزەڵ — ġezaḷ (gazelle); غەم — ġem (sorrow)
Sentence example: غەمەکە کەم بووەوە. — The sorrow has decreased.

input: Alphabet: teach letter 'ف' (Sorani). Provide pronunciation and two short example words and a one-sentence example.
output:
Letter: ف
Pronunciation: /f/
Examples: فێرکار — fêrkar (teacher); فەرهەنگ — ferheng (dictionary/culture)
Sentence example: فەرهەنگ گرنگە. — Culture is important.

input: Alphabet: teach letter 'ق' (Sorani). Provide pronunciation and two short example words and a one-sentence example.
output:
Letter: ق
Pronunciation: /q/ (uvular stop)
Examples: قەڵا — qeła (castle/fort); قوربانی — qurbanî (sacrifice)
Sentence example: قەڵاکە کۆنە. — The castle is old.

input: Alphabet: teach letter 'ک' (Sorani). Provide pronunciation and two short example words and a one-sentence example.
output:
Letter: ک
Pronunciation: /k/
Examples: کورد — Kurd (Kurd); کات — kat (time)
Sentence example: کاتەکە باشە. — The time is good.

input: Alphabet: teach letter 'گ' (Sorani). Provide pronunciation and two short example words and a one-sentence example.
output:
Letter: گ
Pronunciation: /g/
Examples: گوند — gund (village); گەرم — germ (warm)
Sentence example: گوندەکە جوانە. — The village is beautiful.

input: Alphabet: teach letter 'ل' (Sorani). Provide pronunciation and two short example words and a one-sentence example.
output:
Letter: ل
Pronunciation: /l/
Examples: لەنگ — leng (leg); لەناو — lenaw (inside)
Sentence example: من لەناوەوەم. — I am inside.

input: Alphabet: teach letter 'ڵ' (Sorani). Provide pronunciation and two short example words and a one-sentence example.
output:
Letter: ڵ
Pronunciation: /ɫ/ (velarized/dark l)
Examples: بەڵێ — beḷê (yes); ڵادان — ḷadan (to give)
Sentence example: بەڵێ، من دێم. — Yes, I am coming.

input: Alphabet: teach letter 'م' (Sorani). Provide pronunciation and two short example words and a one-sentence example.
output:
Letter: م
Pronunciation: /m/
Examples: من — min (I); مامۆستا — mamosta (teacher)
Sentence example: من مامۆستام. — I am a teacher.

input: Alphabet: teach letter 'ن' (Sorani). Provide pronunciation and two short example words and a one-sentence example.
output:
Letter: ن
Pronunciation: /n/
Examples: نەورۆز — Newroz (Kurdish New Year); نەخۆش — nexoş (sick)
Sentence example: من نەخۆشم. — I am sick.

input: Alphabet: teach letter 'و' (Sorani). Provide pronunciation and two short example words and a one-sentence example.
output:
Letter: و
Pronunciation: /w/ or /u/
Examples: وەرز — werz (season); وەرگرتن — wergirtin (to take/receive)
Sentence example: وەرزی بەهار جوانە. — Spring season is beautiful.

input: Alphabet: teach letter 'ۆ' (Sorani). Provide pronunciation and two short example words and a one-sentence example.
output:
Letter: ۆ
Pronunciation: /o/
Examples: دۆست — dost (friend); گۆڕین — gorîn (change)
Sentence example: دۆستم هاتووە. — My friend has come.

input: Alphabet: teach letter 'ڤ' (Sorani). Provide pronunciation and two short example words and a one-sentence example.
output:
Letter: ڤ
Pronunciation: /v/
Examples: ڤیدیۆ — vîdyo (video); ڤەزیر — vezîr (minister)
Sentence example: ڤیدیۆکە جوانە. — The video is nice.

input: Alphabet: teach letter 'ه' (Sorani). Provide pronunciation and two short example words and a one-sentence example.
output:
Letter: ه
Pronunciation: /h/
Examples: هەوا — hewa (weather/air); هەڵبژاردن — helbijardin (to choose/election)
Sentence example: هەوا خۆشە. — The weather is nice.

input: Alphabet: teach letter 'ە' (Sorani). Provide pronunciation and two short example words and a one-sentence example.
output:
Letter: ە
Pronunciation: /ə/ (schwa)
Examples: مەکتەب — mekteb (school); کەس — kes (person/someone)
Sentence example: من لە مەکتەبدا فێر دەبم. — I learn at school.

input: Alphabet: teach letter 'ی' (Sorani). Provide pronunciation and two short example words and a one-sentence example.
output:
Letter: ی
Pronunciation: /j/ or /i/ (y or i sound)
Examples: یار — yar (friend/beloved); یەک — yek (one)
Sentence example: یەک کتێبم هەیە. — I have one book.

input: Alphabet: teach letter 'ێ' (Sorani). Provide pronunciation and two short example words and a one-sentence example.
output:
Letter: ێ
Pronunciation: /eː/ (long e)
Examples: پێشمەرگە — pêşmerge (peshmerga fighter); پێش — pêş (before/in front)
Sentence example: پێشمەرگەکان ئازان. — The peshmerga are brave.
